name: fal-ai
description: Run any fal.ai model: image generation, video generation, upscaling, and more. Model-agnostic primitives with companion skills for Kling 3.0, Nano Banana 2, and Seedance 2.0.
long_description: A thin, stable fal.ai API wrapper for Claude Desktop. Provides model-agnostic primitives (submit, run, status, result, upload, cancel) that work with any fal.ai model. Dynamic model discovery via fal_search_models. Includes companion skills for Kling 3.0 video generation, Nano Banana 2 image generation, and Seedance 2.0 video generation with full parameter references, prompting guides, and workflow guidance.

fal_key.title: Fal.ai API Key
fal_key.description: Your fal.ai API key. Get one at https://fal.ai/dashboard/keys

tools.name: fal_submit
tools.description: Submit an async job to any fal.ai model

tools.name: fal_upload
tools.description: Upload a file to fal.ai CDN

tools.name: fal_search_models
tools.description: Search fal.ai's full model catalog in real-time
